title: Production Planner (Manufacturing / MNC / Tampines)
description:
Job Summary

  • Job Title: Production Planner

  • Type: German MNC

  • Industry: Semiconductor / Electronics

  • Location: Tampines

Main Responsibilities

  • Design and implement shop floor scheduling strategies to maximize throughput and meet production targets.

  • Set monthly Work-In-Progress (WIP) levels to hit global targets for inventory "days-on-hand," covering everything from raw ingots to finished goods.

  • Conduct time studies to determine equipment capacity, taking into account material flow and process variations.

  • Identify bottlenecks and improve material flow; adjust plans dynamically based on changing customer specifications or yield variations.

  • Manage the specialized scheduling of ingot growth based on product mix and coordinate international deliveries to other company sites.

Requirements

  • Degree in Engineering.

  • Come from a Semiconductor or Manufacturing background.

  • Strong understanding of manufacturing logistics and product costing.

  • Advanced PC skills are required.

  • Proficiency in C++ and Excel VBA (Visual Basic) is a significant advantage.

  • Ability to demonstrate team management skills.

For interested applicants, kindly send your resume in Word/PDF format to include the following in your resume including:

1. Current Salary

2. Expected Salary

3. Availability

4. Reason for leaving

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted applicants will be notified

By submitting any application or resume to us, you will be deemed to have agreed & consented to us collecting, using, retaining & disclosing your personal information to prospective employers with the services provided by us.

Nguyen Thi Doan | R23116355

RRecruiter Pte. Ltd. | 18C9514
